title: May 18, 2026
sentiment: We build at the speed of acquisition, and still wonder what it means to be present in a world that rewrites itself every quarter.

stories.title: Anthropic acquires Stainless
stories.summary: When the companies that build the tools start acquiring the companies that polish them, the polish becomes part of the machinery.

stories.title: The last six months in LLMs in five minutes
stories.summary: Six months is an eternity now. The recap is already a relic by the time you finish reading it.

stories.title: Click (2016)
stories.summary: A whole world compressed into a single click — each one a decision about where attention goes, and what it costs.
